name: nuzo-memory
description: Local-first, auditable memory for Codex, Claude Code, and MCP-compatible AI agents.

scripts.build: npm run clean:dist && npm run build -w @nuzo/memory-core && npm run build -w @nuzo/memory-cli && npm run build -w @nuzo/mcp-server
scripts.check: npm run check:supply-chain && npm run validate:marketplaces && npm run check --workspaces --if-present
scripts.smoke:cli: npm run build && rm -rf /tmp/nuzo-cli-smoke && npm run nuzo -- memory --store /tmp/nuzo-cli-smoke/memories.sqlite init && npm run nuzo -- memory --store /tmp/nuzo-cli-smoke/memories.sqlite remember "CLI smoke backup restore fake data." --kind note --tag smoke && npm run nuzo -- memory --store /tmp/nuzo-cli-smoke/memories.sqlite integrity && npm run nuzo -- memory --store /tmp/nuzo-cli-smoke/memories.sqlite backup --path /tmp/nuzo-cli-smoke/memories.backup.sqlite --overwrite && npm run nuzo -- memory --store /tmp/nuzo-cli-smoke/restored.sqlite restore /tmp/nuzo-cli-smoke/memories.backup.sqlite --yes && npm run nuzo -- memory --store /tmp/nuzo-cli-smoke/restored.sqlite integrity && NUZO_DOCTOR_SKIP_GIT=1 npm run nuzo -- memory --store /tmp/nuzo-cli-smoke/restored.sqlite doctor
scripts.test: npm run test:tools && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
